result:
Filled 50 decisions for the Astrolabe MVP Part 1 plan at `/workspace/nexus-mk2/.scratch/patron-anima-eval/agent-output/astrolabe-mvp-part-1.yaml`.

Highlights of the shape:

- **High-confidence engine-contract picks** — D13/D14/D15/D34/D36/D40/D43/D44 all landed cleanly on principles about extension-point ownership (#14), hard contract lines (#15), fail-loud boundaries (#2), and no-persisted-derived-state (#19).
- **MVP-restraint picks** — D6, D8, D10, D18, D35 all defaulted to the spec/thinnest-slice, citing #18 (earn structure from a second consumer) and #23.
- **Precedent picks** — D19, D20, D25, D38, D45, D47, D48, D49 all leaned on #13 (first live writer sets precedent) to match Clerk/Spider/writ-list patterns.
- **Scaffold-the-slot pick** — D23 (sage instructions) went to `instructionsFile` on #37, since inline instructions are known-coming extraction.
- No `custom` answers were required — the option frames were all principled. Most decisions had a clear principle firing; confidence distribution is roughly high on contract/structural questions and medium on composition/naming questions where multiple principles partially spoke.
